response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and systems development experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) work, aligning partially with the GenAI/cloud focus. While his AI/ML experience is not as deep or explicit as required, his technical leadership, cloud tooling, and enterprise integration skills make him a viable candidate for further evaluation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS), relevant to enterprise integration.
Proven technical leadership and mentorship, including workshops and open-source contributions, indicating ability to drive engineering excellence.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP at re:cinq, demonstrating exposure to cutting-edge GenAI tooling.
concerns: Lacks explicit 8+ years of building production-grade AI solutions; AI experience appears secondary to broader software development.
No direct mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance optimization in resume highlights.
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or designing AI systems for enterprise customers as a primary responsibility.

key_factors.factor: Exposure to MCP and agentic workflows
